name: Patient Intake to Doctor-Approved SOAP Note Automation

parameters.content:
## 🩺 AI Symptom-to-SOAP Note Generator

### How it works
Patients fill out a symptom form built directly in n8n. Their input is sent to GPT-4o Mini, which generates a structured SOAP note (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan). The draft is emailed to the assigned doctor using n8n's built-in Send & Wait feature — the doctor clicks Approve or Request Edit right from their inbox. On approval, the record is saved to Google Sheets and both the patient and doctor are notified via Gmail and Telegram. If the GPT step fails, a Slack alert fires immediately.

### Setup steps
1. Connect your **OpenAI** credential to the GPT node
2. Connect your **Gmail OAuth2** credential to all Gmail nodes
3. Connect your **Google Sheets OAuth2** credential and set your Sheet ID and tab name
4. Connect your **Telegram Bot** credential and set the doctor's Chat ID in the Set node
5. Connect your **Slack OAuth2** credential and select your alert channel
6. Replace `doctor@yourclinic.com` in the Set node with the real doctor email
7. Activate the workflow and share the form URL with patients

## 📋 Patient Intake & AI Drafting
Patient submits symptoms via the n8n Form. GPT-4o Mini converts the raw input into a clinical SOAP note. The Set node packages all patient fields and generates a unique review token for this submission.

## 🩻 Doctor Review (Send & Wait)
The draft SOAP note is emailed to the doctor with native n8n approval buttons. The workflow pauses here until the doctor clicks Approve or Request Edit. No external webhook needed.

## ✅ Approval Path
On approval, the note and patient data are appended to Google Sheets. A confirmation email goes to the patient, followed by Telegram messages to both the patient and doctor.

## ✏️ Edit Request Path
If the doctor requests an edit, the original SOAP draft is emailed back to them with correction instructions, and a Telegram alert confirms the edit request was received.

## ⚠️ Error Handling
Two layers of error coverage: the GPT node uses `continueErrorOutput` to catch AI failures inline and fire a Slack alert. A global Error Trigger catches any other node failure across the entire workflow and alerts the same Slack channel.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use OAuth2 for Gmail, Google Sheets, and Slack. Use API key for OpenAI and Bot Token for Telegram. Never hardcode emails or chat IDs in shared templates — use the Set node as the single config point.

parameters.formDescription: Please fill in your details and symptoms below. A doctor will review your case and you will be notified shortly.

values.content: You are a clinical documentation assistant. Your task is to convert raw patient symptom data into a structured SOAP note following standard medical documentation format. Be thorough, professional, and clinically precise. Format the output clearly with each SOAP section labeled.

nodes.name: Send SOAP Draft to Doctor for Approval

parameters.message:
=

🩺 SOAP Note Pending Review

AI-generated draft requires your approval before filing

Patient Information

Patient Name:{{ $json.patient_name }}
Date of Birth:{{ $json.date_of_birth }}
Chief Complaint:{{ $json.chief_complaint }}
Submitted:{{ $json.submission_timestamp }}

AI-Generated SOAP Note Draft

{{ $json.soap_note_draft }}

⚠️ Action Required

Use the approval buttons below (provided by n8n) to Approve or Request an Edit on this SOAP note.

Token: {{ $json.review_token }} | Unique to this submission.
parameters.subject: =🩺 [ACTION REQUIRED] SOAP Note Review – {{ $json.patient_name }} | {{ $now.format('MMM D, YYYY') }}

nodes.name: Save Approved Note to Google Sheets

value.approved: ={{ $('Send SOAP Draft to Doctor for Approval').item.json.data.approved }}

parameters.message:
=

Your Consultation is Confirmed ✅

Your clinical note has been reviewed and filed by your doctor.

Dear {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.patient_name }},

Your symptom submission has been reviewed by your assigned physician and your clinical note has been successfully filed.

📋 Next Steps

  • You will be contacted to schedule your follow-up appointment within 1–2 business days.
  • If your symptoms worsen, please visit the nearest urgent care or call our clinic directly.
  • Bring a valid ID and insurance card to your appointment.
  • Continue any currently prescribed medications as directed.

⚠️ Emergency Notice

For chest pain, difficulty breathing, or any emergency — call 112 or go to your nearest ER immediately.

Warm regards,
Your Care Team

Submission ID: {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.review_token }} | {{ $now.format('MMMM D, YYYY') }}
parameters.subject: =Your Consultation is Confirmed – {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.patient_name }}

parameters.text:
=🏥 *Clinic Update – Your SOAP Note is Filed*

Hi {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.patient_name }},

Your symptom submission has been reviewed and approved by your doctor. ✅

📋 *Chief Complaint:* {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.chief_complaint }}
📅 *Submitted:* {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.submission_timestamp }}

*Next Steps:*
• You will be contacted within 1–2 business days to schedule your follow-up.
• For emergencies, call *112* immediately.

_This is an automated notification from your clinic._

nodes.name: Send Edit Request Back to Doctor

parameters.message:
=

✏️ Edit Requested on SOAP Note

You have requested an edit on the SOAP note for {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.patient_name }}.

The original draft is below for your reference. Please reply to this email or contact the admin team with your corrections.

{{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.soap_note_draft }}

Token: {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.review_token }}
parameters.subject: =📝 Edit Requested – SOAP Note for {{ $('Prepare Patient & Note Data').item.json.patient_name }}
